name: 倒立洗頭羞辱兌現
description: 全身骨折的霸總被迫兌現賭約，倒立洗頭的荒誕畫面既是喜劇高潮也是男主服軟的標誌性時刻。
tags: 霸總的尊嚴vs賭約的約束力，喜劇效果與權力反轉並存

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: ridiculous handstand hair wash. Even a dog wouldn't do that. Just washing my hair. Perfect timing. I got into a car accident toda...
examples.context: 霸總的尊嚴vs賭約的約束力，喜劇效果與權力反轉並存
